raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Local governments in California are seeking to protect public safety through governance of autonomous vehicles.",
    "California has allowed the deployment of autonomous vehicles in the Bay Area and Los Angeles without local jurisdiction oversight.",
    "Local law enforcement agencies cannot ticket autonomous vehicles for moving violations.",
    "Driverless robotaxis have been involved in hundreds of accidents in San Francisco.",
    "SB 915 aims to integrate local oversight of driverless vehicles into existing regulations for traditional vehicles while maintaining state authority.",
    "Communities across California are recognizing the importance of local input for the safe deployment of autonomous vehicles."
  ]
}
```
